meta.title: US F-22 Raptor sets NEW RECORD for long-range AMRAAM shot
meta.description:
Make sure to go to https://www.recwatches.com/timepieces/limited-editions/aircraft/x4009-semtra-black/ and use PROMO CODE: SAND to get an extra 10% off your own Spitfire timepiece! 

-- Break -- 

The US Air Force just announced that an F-22 Raptor recently scored the longest known hit on an airborne target using an AIM-120 AMRAAM, or Advanced Medium Range Air-to-Air Missile. But just how far out that target was… remains a mystery. The record breaking shot took place near Eglin Air Force Base in Florida last Fall, but hadn’t been disclosed until now.
